sources.authority: Swiss Seismological Service (SED) at ETH Zurich
sources.notes: FDSN web service providing the SED earthquake catalogue of Switzerland from AD 250 to the most recent verified events (QuakeML/text/geojson). Mirror of arclink.ethz.ch; eida.ethz.ch is the live host.

sources.authority: WSL Institute for Snow and Avalanche Research SLF
sources.notes: Official Swiss avalanche bulletin and snow situation, including danger levels, aspects and altitude bands. Endpoint reachable (301/307 redirect to HTTPS SPA). Structured bulletin data is also published via the EAWS common format.

sources.authority: MeteoSwiss (Federal Office of Meteorology and Climatology)
sources.attribution: MeteoSwiss / Federal Office of Meteorology and Climatology
sources.notes: SwissMetNet (SMN) automatic weather stations open-data collection served via the federal geo.admin.ch STAC API (OGC STAC). Returns 200. Provides current 10-minute observations (temperature, precipitation, wind, etc.). Additional MeteoSwiss OGD collections include local forecasting and ICON-CH model data.

Swissgrid publishes control-area load, generation mix and balancing data aggregates (15-minute resolution) for the Swiss electricity grid. Download requires a free registered access account — hence api-key. Also available via the ENTSO-E Transparency Platform (security token required).

sources.authority: Federal Office for the Environment FOEN (BAFU)
sources.attribution: Federal Office for the Environment FOEN
sources.notes: FOEN hydrology data portal: river levels, discharges and lake levels from the Swiss hydrological monitoring network (NADUG/Hydrodaten). Endpoint reachable (301 redirect). Time-series data is also exposed via geo.admin.ch (ch.bafu.hydrologie) and the Hydrology API.

sources.authority: Swiss Federal Office for Civil Protection FOCP (PLANAT)
sources.notes: Swiss national natural-hazards portal aggregating flood, storm, forest-fire, earthquake and other hazard information from FOEN, MeteoSwiss, SLF and cantonal authorities. Returns 200.
